faq.q1: How long does the whole process take?
faq.a1: On average, from the moment of selection to receiving the car, it takes 10-14 days for custom orders and 7-10 days for purchases from our available stock.
faq.q2: What is the cost of your services?
faq.a2: The cost depends on the type and price of the car. On average, our commission ranges from 50,000 to 100,000 rubles and includes all stages: selection, inspection, delivery, and customs clearance.
faq.a3: We provide a legal guarantee of the car's clean history, photo reports at all stages, and an official contract. We also help with warranty service at official dealers in Russia.
faq.q4: Can I buy a car on installment?
faq.a4: Yes, we provide our own installment plan for purchasing cars from Europe on favorable terms. The down payment amount and payment schedule are discussed individually.

howWeWorkPage.v1.step3.desc: We arrange detailed inspection of the selected car, conduct technical diagnostics and document verification. After your approval, we purchase the car on your behalf.

howWeWorkPage.v2.step4.desc: When all procedures are completed and the car is ready for transfer, you pay for the car itself after purchase — without hidden fees or prepayment for the car.

aboutPage.title: About SPORT TECH LLC
aboutPage.subtitle: We have been helping people purchase quality cars from Europe since 2019
aboutPage.history.title: Our Story
aboutPage.history.p1: SPORT TECH LLC was founded on February 6, 2019 by a group of enthusiasts who noticed a growing demand for quality cars from Europe and decided to make the process of purchasing them simple and safe for Russian buyers.
aboutPage.history.p2: Over the years, we have helped more than 500 clients purchase their dream cars, built a reliable network of partners in Germany, France, Belgium and other EU countries, and refined the process down to the smallest details.
aboutPage.history.p3: Today, SPORT TECH is a team of professionals providing a full range of car import services: from initial consultation to handing over the keys to a ready-to-use vehicle.

faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Car Import from Europe
faqPage.subtitle: Answers to the most popular questions about the process, cost and guarantees
faqPage.cta.title: Didn't find the answer to your question?
faqPage.cta.desc: Contact us in a convenient way and our specialists will answer all your questions in detail
faqPage.general.q1: How long does the entire car import process take?
faqPage.general.a1: On average, from the moment of car selection to receiving the keys, it takes 10-14 days for custom orders and 7-10 days for purchases from our stock in Europe. Exact timelines depend on the speed of decision-making and the chosen work option. We always try to minimize timelines and keep you informed at every stage.
faqPage.general.q2: From which countries do you import cars?
faqPage.general.a2: We work with most European Union countries: Germany, France, Belgium, Netherlands, Italy, Poland and others. The choice of country depends on the availability of the desired model and the best price-quality ratio. Germany remains the main market due to huge selection and transaction transparency.
faqPage.general.q3: Do I need to travel to Europe to buy a car?
faqPage.general.a3: No, it's not necessary. We take full responsibility for all stages: from searching and inspecting the car to delivering it to you ready to use. You receive detailed photo reports at every stage. However, if you want to personally inspect the car before purchase and have the necessary documents for traveling abroad, we can arrange such a trip.
faqPage.general.q4: What documents will I receive when buying a car?
faqPage.general.a4: You will receive a complete package of documents: European vehicle passport, purchase agreement, customs declaration, customs clearance documents, registration certificate after registration with traffic police. All documents are legal and allow free operation of the vehicle in Russia.
faqPage.cost.q1: What is the cost of your services?
faqPage.cost.a1: The cost of our services depends on the type and price of the car. On average, our commission ranges from 50,000 to 100,000 rubles and includes all stages: selection, inspection, purchase arrangement, delivery and customs clearance. We provide an exact calculation after discussing your wishes.
faqPage.cost.q2: What additional costs should be considered?
faqPage.cost.a2: Additional payment is charged only if the client orders address delivery and vehicle registration. The cost of these services may differ in different regions. We provide a full calculation of all expenses before starting work.
faqPage.cost.a3: Payment occurs in stages. First, a deposit is made, which we use to pay for customs clearance, associated costs and logistics. The deposit amount is fixed in the contract. The client pays for the car itself after purchase. All payments are detailed in the contract, we work officially with contract and receipts.
faqPage.cost.q4: Can I buy a car in installments?
faqPage.cost.a4: Yes, we provide our own installment plan for purchasing cars from Europe on favorable terms. The down payment amount and payment schedule are discussed individually - we select a scheme that will be comfortable specifically for you. The rate and terms depend on the car's cost and chosen conditions, with all payments transparent and fixed in the contract in advance.
faqPage.verification.q1: How do you check cars before purchase?
faqPage.verification.a1: We conduct comprehensive inspection of each car before purchase. Technical condition is assessed at certified DEKRA service - specialists perform detailed inspection, paint coating measurement, suspension check, engine, electronics and chassis. In parallel, we check the complete car history via carVertical database: mileage, accident involvement, insurance cases, possible odometer rollback and other hidden risks. Additionally, we analyze legal clearance and absence of encumbrances. You receive all inspection results as a clear and detailed report to make a purchase decision with full understanding of the car's condition.
faqPage.verification.a2: We provide legal guarantee of car cleanliness: we check for absence of liens, theft and any hidden encumbrances. All deal conditions, timelines and amounts are fixed in official contract. If after inspection the car doesn't match stated characteristics, we either eliminate the identified problem or return all paid money. Additionally, we provide a 2-month warranty on the car after delivery to the client.
faqPage.verification.q3: What to do if problems are discovered after purchase?
faqPage.verification.a3: We are responsible for the legal cleanliness of the car. If it turns out that the car was stolen, pledged or has hidden legal problems, we fully compensate your expenses. On technical issues: we check everything before purchase, but if something is revealed, we will help organize repair or warranty service.
faqPage.delivery.q1: How is the car delivered to Russia?
faqPage.delivery.a1: Delivery is carried out by car carrier - covered or open, depending on the car class and your preferences. Covered car carrier provides maximum protection from external influences and is especially recommended for premium cars. We insure the car for the entire delivery period. You can track the car's location in real time.
faqPage.delivery.q2: How much does customs clearance cost?
faqPage.delivery.a2: Customs payments depend on the age, engine volume and cost of the car. For passenger cars up to 3 years old, the duty usually ranges from 15% to 30% of the customs value. We provide exact calculation of customs payments after selecting a specific car.
faqPage.delivery.a3: With proper document processing, problems arise extremely rarely. We have extensive experience in customs clearance and know all the nuances. We prepare a complete package of documents and properly declare the car. If customs has questions, we take their resolution upon ourselves.
faqPage.registration.q1: Do you help with vehicle registration?
faqPage.registration.a1: Yes, we help with the entire registration process: prepare document package for traffic police, help process insurance, arrange technical inspection (if required), can accompany to traffic police or handle everything turnkey. We can also help with getting beautiful license plates.
faqPage.registration.a2: With all documents available, registration takes 1-3 days. This depends on the workload of the specific traffic police office. We help you make an appointment in advance to minimize waiting time. In some regions, accelerated registration is possible in 1 day.
